mapper.sql: sc.id, sc.exam_id, sc.paper_id, sc.course_id, sc.student_id, sc.total_score, sc.objective_score, sc.subjective_score, sc.rank, sc.submit_time, sc.create_time, sc.update_time, e.name as exam_name, p.name as paper_name, c.name as course_name, s.name as student_name, s.student_no, s.class_name
mapper.select: select from score sc left join exam e on sc.exam_id = e.id left join paper p on sc.paper_id = p.id left join course c on sc.course_id = c.id left join student s on sc.student_id = s.id where sc.id = #{id}

select from score sc left join exam e on sc.exam_id = e.id left join paper p on sc.paper_id = p.id left join course c on sc.course_id = c.id left join student s on sc.student_id = s.id order by sc.create_time desc

select from score sc left join exam e on sc.exam_id = e.id left join paper p on sc.paper_id = p.id left join course c on sc.course_id = c.id left join student s on sc.student_id = s.id where sc.exam_id = #{examId} order by sc.total_score desc

select from score sc left join exam e on sc.exam_id = e.id left join paper p on sc.paper_id = p.id left join course c on sc.course_id = c.id left join student s on sc.student_id = s.id where sc.student_id = #{studentId} order by sc.create_time desc

select from score sc left join exam e on sc.exam_id = e.id left join paper p on sc.paper_id = p.id left join course c on sc.course_id = c.id left join student s on sc.student_id = s.id where sc.exam_id = #{examId} and sc.student_id = #{studentId}
mapper.insert: insert into score(exam_id, paper_id, course_id, student_id, total_score, objective_score, subjective_score, rank, submit_time) values(#{examId}, #{paperId}, #{courseId}, #{studentId}, #{totalScore}, #{objectiveScore}, #{subjectiveScore}, #{rank}, #{submitTime})
mapper.delete:
delete from score where id in
#{id}
